elements.description: Interior wall elevation showing full-height ceramic tile from floor to a mirror strip near the top; overall wall height 2.70 m, tile/fixture zone height 2.00 m (sub-split 0.60 lower + 0.20 + 0.20 grout/coursing lines + 1.00 mirror strip near ceiling, reading bottom to top)
Mirror (M.), left side of elevation, above LAV.2 wash basin
Wall-hung wash basin below the mirror
Hand-shower/bidet spray (HS.) fitting mounted low, between LAV.2 and WC.1
Toilet (WC.1), center of elevation, with PH. paper holder to its right
Hand-held shower head (SW.) with hose, right side of elevation, in the อาบน้ำ (shower) zone
Soap dish (SP.) mounted above the SW. shower area
Floor-washing tap (K.) mounted low, right side of the shower zone
Floor-level box marker '[3]+0.50[2]' under the WC.1 zone (ห้องน้ำ 1)
Floor-level box marker '[3]+0.48[2]' under the shower zone (อาบน้ำ) -- 20mm lower than the WC.1 zone, consistent with the floor slope note on the plan sheet
Bottom horizontal dimension chain: 0.45 + 0.70 + 0.40 + 0.40 + 0.40 = 2.45 m total, sub-grouped as 1.55 m (left cluster) + 0.10 + 0.80 (right cluster incl. shower zone)
Circled callouts '2' (top) and '3' (left, mid-height) mark tile-material or section-reference points, matching the same numbering seen on the WC.1 plan (หน้า11)

warnings: PATTERN RECLASSIFIED (t4, 2026-07-08 taxonomy): t3 classified this view as 'section'. Under the new taxonomy, pattern 'section' is defined specifically as 'ขยาย/รายละเอียดหน้าตัด (สเปคเหล็ก/มิติ) — เช่น หน้าตัดคาน เสา ฐานราก' (steel-spec/dimension detail of a structural cross-section, e.g. beam/column/footing). This sheet has no rebar or steel member spec at all -- it is a pure architectural interior wall elevation (tile coursing, fixture mounting positions, floor levels). That fits the new pattern 'side_profile' instead ('มุมมองที่ไม่ใช่ top view เน้นมุมมองด้านข้าง เช่น รูปด้าน/รูปตัดอาคาร' -- explicitly includes 'รูปตัดอาคาร'/building sections). Reclassified accordingly; element content unchanged from t3.

This sheet (A-10) shows two interior wall elevations/sections of the WC.1 bathroom (labelled '1' and '2' at the bottom, matching the sectioning arrows on the plan sheet หน้า11); kept as two sibling files since each is a distinct view -- this file covers view '1' (left elevation, spanning the WC.1 and อาบน้ำ zones). View '2' is in _หน้า12_wc1_side_profile2.json.
The overall 2.45 m width dimension chain and 0.48/0.50 m level markers match exactly what was read independently on the plan sheet (หน้า11_wc1_plan.json) -- cross-consistent.
Fine tile-coursing sub-dimensions (0.60/0.20/0.20/1.00 breakdown of the 2.00 m zone) are small print and only medium confidence; flagged for zoom review.

Independent read done first, then cross-checked against t3's หน้า12_wc1_section1.json: identical element set, dimensions, and confidence levels. No content disagreement -- only the pattern classification and filename changed.
